name: han
description: Han's personal skill set: skill-creator-plus (self-learning skill factory), han-imagen (image generation engine, OpenAI/Google), han-infographic / han-hand-write-pic / han-disassembly-diagram (infographic, sketchnote, teardown skills with anti-hallucination two-phase flow + self-learning), han-slides (image slide deck → PPTX/PDF), han-svg (editable SVG diagrams), llm-wiki (personal knowledge-base wiki with 9 commands).
